data.name: Thrust 8
data.detailed_description:
[Story]

有一天，主角在一個陌生的地方醒來。

五彩繽紛的燈光刺激著他的眼睛，美麗的女人引誘著他。

主角不知不覺地走進一個入口。

在他面前，他看見結實、色彩繽紛的臀部在搖擺。

在他面前彈出一句話。

「如果您找到您想要的 8 號屁股，就可以插入它！」

在理解了這句話之後，主角眼神閃爍地向前走去。

[玩法]

*選擇一位女性角色作為目標。

*好好記住她的臀部。

*將畫面上的臀部移到「如果你有她的臀部！」畫面的右方。

*如果您在螢幕上沒有看到她的臀部，請移動到螢幕左軸。

*連續猜對 8 次，即可觸發事件場景。

[遊戲特色］

*有 8 位不同的女性可供捕捉。

*她們有不同的外貌（身高、膚色、臀部大小、胸部大小和陰部形狀）。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Window 10
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Thrust 8
data.detailed_description:
[Story]

One day, the protagonist wakes up in a strange place.

Bright, stimulating lights dazzle the protagonist's eyes, and beautiful women tempt him.

Without realizing it, the protagonist enters a doorway.

In front of them, firm buttocks of various colors swayed.

A sentence appeared before their eyes.

“If you find the buttocks you want, you can insert it!”

Understanding the sentence, the protagonist's eyes sparkled as they walked forward.

[How to Play]

*Select one female character to target.

*Remember her buttocks well.

*If the buttocks you selected are among those displayed on the screen, move to the right side of the screen.

*If the buttocks you selected are not among those displayed on the screen, move to the left side of the screen.

*If you match 8 times in a row, an event scene will unfold.

[Game Features]

*8 female characters appear that can be targeted.

*They have various appearances (height, skin color, butt size, breast size, genital shape).
